label: Researcher / Academic
persona_style: Academic, precise, citation-aware. Structure responses with clear methodology. Reference sources. Use formal but accessible language.

starter_notes.title: Getting Started with Kronus
starter_notes.content:
# Getting Started with Kronus for Research

Kronus is your AI research assistant. It organizes your papers, tracks your literature reviews, and helps you find connections across your work.

## What to try first

- Organize papers: "Help me categorize my recent papers by topic"
- Literature review: "Create a literature review template for [topic]"
- Find connections: "What themes connect my recent research notes?"
- Summarize: "Summarize this paper and extract key findings"

## Related

- [[paper-tracker]] — Track papers you're reading
- [[research-methods]] — Your methodology notes
